name: Mocha Buttercream Frosting
recipeIngredient: 1 teaspoon Vanilla extract or almond extract
recipeInstructions:
1. Cream butter at medium speed of an electric mixer.
2. Gradually add sugar, beating until light and fluffy.
3. Dissolve instant coffee powder in milk; add to butter and sugar mixture.
4. Beat until reaching a spreading consistency.
5. Stir in vanilla.
Yield: 3 cups.
